mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.id AS u_id, u.nickname AS u_nickname, u.profile_image AS u_profile_image FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.author_id = u.id WHERE p.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.*, u.id AS u_id, u.nickname AS u_nickname, u.profile_image AS u_profile_image FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.author_id = u.id WHERE p.author_id IN ( SELECT target_id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT p.*, u.id AS u_id, u.nickname AS u_nickname, u.profile_image AS u_profile_image FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.author_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (title, content, image_url, category, author_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{category}, #{authorId})
